_comment: SEED DATA Mars: 24x24=576 cases. GENERE depuis WAX (underpunks55 / template 848387) par scripts/build-mars-map.mjs. owner=wallet via wallets.json (neftyblocksp=pool non reclame). market=annonces AtomicMarket reelles. railway/medical/rustwind/npc = overlays rendus par gridRender. Ne pas editer a la main : relancer le script.

theme._comment: Mars: rouille martienne sur ciel sombre.
theme.label: #FFEAD8

This pure PROSPERA zone within the protected boundary of the new-human megacity on Mars is the perfect place to mine if you have REP with the Martians or the player-owned PEARL corporation. Mars has been completely terraformed and these Prospera biomes are rich in metals due to their ancient volcanic activity (now dormant). The image of this NFT is mutable and contains the available biomes on this land - which can be changed using very advanced TECH.

This zone is a lawless blend of BADLANDS and MEADOW biomes, with the Great Martian Railway cutting through it, generating passive income through TAX and attracting a lot of attention from bandits. Situated between the Martian megacity and the remote town of Redwater Junction, this zone has been partially terraformed. The Meadows support biological gameplay, while the Badlands offer dangerous exploration opportunities. The image of this NFT is mutable and contains the available biomes on this land - which can be changed using very advanced TECH.

This zone, located on the southern boundary of the Martian megacity and crossed by the Great Martian Railway, is a mix of BADLANDS and PROSPERA biomes. Barely terraformed, it offers passive income through railway TAX. This zone in the southern hemisphere of Mars, sits above The Hellas Abyss, Mars' deepest lake, fed by a Noxwater river that begins relatively pure but becomes increasingly toxic as it cascades into the abyss. Featuring five distinct biomes - Noxwater (river), Shore, Meadow, Badlands, and Prospera - this area offers both life-sustaining resources and deadly hazards. The Meadows offer thriving biological gameplay, while the Shore is an ideal place to launch boats and submarines to explore the corrupted gameplay of the abyss. Badlands stretch out with lawless danger and chaotic landscapes, contrasting with the wealth and opportunity of Prospera zones, rich with ancient volcanic metals. The image of this NFT is mutable and contains the available biomes on this land – which can be changed using very advanced TECH.

This zone, located on the south-west shore of the Hellas Abyss, is a precarious stretch of land featuring three biomes - Noxwater, Shore, and Meadow. Sitting right on the edge of Promethean Revenants (PRV) territory, this area is perfect for those seeking corrupted gameplay and opportunities to earn REP with the ruthless mutant hackers. The Meadows offer a false sense of serenity, while the Shore is a volatile boundary between the toxic Noxwater of the Abyss and the chaotic influence of the PRV. Players here can engage in clandestine operations, sabotage missions, or tap into the Promethean Revenants' black market for illicit tech.
